intro: 这里更适合做平台入口页：放账号链接、简短介绍和更新方向。先把 B 站和小红书集中在这里，后续如果 ADHDer 内容沉淀成体系，再拆出独立专题页会更清晰。
introEn: This page works best as a platform hub for profile links, short introductions, and the latest direction of your work. Keep Bilibili and Xiaohongshu here first, then create a dedicated topic page later if your ADHDer content grows into a bigger knowledge base.
